vBRIEFInfo.description: Story vBRIEF for #1889 terminal epic render/validation agreement.

plan.title: fix(vbrief): allow terminal epic child links to validate

narratives.Description: Cancelled or completed epic vBRIEFs can retain x-vbrief/plan links to completed child stories. project:render faithfully mirrors those links into PROJECT-DEFINITION, but vbrief:validate currently requires every referenced child scope to have exactly the same status as the parent registry item. That makes terminal epic/child decompositions fail validation after render even when every referenced scope is terminal.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: 1. Teach PROJECT-DEFINITION registry-status validation to compare item status only with the item source_path scope, not with related child x-vbrief/plan references. 2. Preserve exact source_path mismatch failures so registry rows still match their source vBRIEFs. 3. Add focused TypeScript validator coverage for independent child-link statuses and source_path exactness. 4. Run vBRIEF validation and focused tests.
narratives.UserStory: As a maintainer rendering project state, I want completed/cancelled epic decompositions with terminal children to validate, so project:render does not create a PROJECT-DEFINITION that vbrief:validate rejects for legitimate terminal history.
narratives.Acceptance: A PROJECT-DEFINITION item may reference child vBRIEFs with independent lifecycle statuses without a D3 registry-status error. The item's metadata.source_path status check remains exact, including for terminal scopes. Existing path existence checks continue to run. Regression coverage pins terminal child-link allowance, non-terminal child-link allowance, and source_path mismatch rejection.
narratives.NonGoals: No new lifecycle command, no automatic parent status reclassification, no child planRef rewrite, no project:render ordering/churn fix, and no broad cleanup of existing lifecycle source data.

items.title: Create and activate a #1889 story vBRIEF
Update registry-status validation semantics for terminal parent/child links
Add focused regression tests for terminal allowance and non-terminal mismatch
Run focused validation and complete the story lifecycle

references.title: Issue #1889: vBRIEF: cancelled epics with completed children silently break project:render + D3 validate (no reconcile path)
Issue #1715: bug(project:render): regenerated PROJECT-DEFINITION fails task vbrief:validate (D3 registry-status) + large reordering churn vs committed file
PR #1885: docs(codebase): reconcile MAP rollout closeout

expected_outputs: registry items may reference child scopes with independent lifecycle statuses
source_path status mismatches still fail registry-status
